mapper.insert: insert into feed ( username, feed_content, like_cnt, reply_cnt, created_at, edited_at, deleted ) values ( #{username}, #{feedContent}, #{likeCnt}, #{replyCnt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{deleted} )
mapper.select:
select feed_id, f.username, feed_content, like_cnt, reply_cnt, created_at, nickname, skin_type, personal_color
from feed f join member m on f.username = m.username where deleted=0 order by created_at desc
SELECT count(*) FROM feed WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into feed_reply( reply_id, feed_id, username, reply_content, like_cnt, deleted ) values( #{replyId}, #{feedId}, #{username}, #{replyContent}, #{likeCnt}, #{deleted} )
